name: Strawberry & Rhubarb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and orange rind.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg, milk, and oil.
4. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients.
5. Gently stir in the rhubarb and strawberries. Do not overmix.
6. Fill 12 well-greased muffin cups about 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Sprinkle the muffin tops lightly with sugar.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
